properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v4 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I can barely stand right now Everything is crashing down And I wonder where you are

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I try to find the words to pray I don't always know what to say But you're the one who can hear my heart

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Even though I don't know what your plan is I know you make beauty from these ashes

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I've seen joy and I've seen pain And on my knees I call your name Here's my broken hallelujah With nothing left to hold onto I raise these empty hands to you Here's my broken Here's my broken hallelujah Hallelujah, hallelujah Here's my broken hallelujah

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You know the things that have brought me here You know the story of every tear 'Cause you've been here from the very start

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: When all is taken away Don't let my heart be changed Let me always sing hallelujah When I feel afraid, Don't let my hope be erased Let me always sing Let me always sing

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Hallelujah, hallelujah Hallelujah (I will always sing) Hallelujah (I will always sing) Hallelujah (here's my broken hallelujah) Here's my broken Hallelujah (I will always sing) Hallelujah (I will always sing) Hallelujah (here's my broken hallelujah) Here's my broken Hallelujah Hallelujah Hallelujah Hallelujah
